title: Job Openings at LAADS HR Consulting
content:
LAADS HR Consulting, offers structure to Small and Medium Enterprise, we focus on total Personality Development aimed at transforming and refining individual to positively impact the organization.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Facials & Massage therapist

Job Location: VGC, Lekki-Epe ExpressWay, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are looking for a skilled Facial & Body Massage Therapist to join our team.


Requirements
     

            
    




	Experienced in facials and body massage treatments
	Good customer service and communication skills
	Neat, professional, and reliable
	Ability to recommend suitable skincare treatments (added advantage).


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 per month. 

Application Closing Date: 31st July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should Send their CV / Portfolio to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more information WhatsApp: 08148102662.

 

 

2.) Esthetician / Aesthetician

Job Location: VGC, Lekki Phase 2 - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Are you passionate about skincare and beauty? Join our team!


Requirements


	Certified Esthetician / Aesthetician.
	Experience in facials, skincare treatments, and hair removal services.
	Excellent customer service and communication skills.
	Professional appearance and positive attitude.
	Ability to recommend skincare products and treatments.


Responsibilities


	Perform professional skincare treatments and facials.
	Conduct skin assessments and client consultations.
	Maintain a clean, safe, and hygienic treatment environment.
	Provide excellent client care and aftercare advice.


Salary
N150,000 - N200,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 29th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should Send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Only qualified candidates will be contacted.
	For more information WhatsApp: 08148102662.


 

3.) Personal Professional Driver

Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary 


	We are seeking a reliable and professional Personal Driver to provide safe and efficient transportation services.


Responsibilities


	Drive employer safely to and from destinations
	Maintain punctuality and professionalism at all times
	Ensure vehicle cleanliness and basic maintenance checks
	Follow traffic rules and road safety practices
	Maintain confidentiality and good work ethics


Requirements


	Valid driver’s license
	Good knowledge of routes and road networks
	Minimum driving experience required
	Must be reliable, disciplined, and well-presented.


Application Closing Date: 29th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should Send their application to: [email protected]  using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note: For more information WhatsApp: 08148102662.

 

4.) Nail Technician

Job Location: VGC, Lekki - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Provide professional manicure and pedicure services
	Maintain a clean and hygienic workstation
	Ensure client comfort and satisfaction
	Recommend appropriate nail care products and treatments


Requirements


	Experience in manicure and pedicure services
	Good knowledge of nail care, hygiene, and sanitation practices
	Excellent customer service skills
	Professional appearance and positive attitude
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team


Salary
N120,000 - N150,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 30th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should Send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

Note


	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.
	For more information WhatsApp: 08148102662.


     

    

        Click here to Apply

  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Bespoke Processing Engineer",
  "description": "Unified Payment Services Limited is a group of companies with services including Banking, Payment Scheme, Financial Technology, Digital Commerce, Value Added Service, Payment Solutions, Software Solutions, etc. Unified Payments is a principal member or licensed acquirer of American Express, Mastercard, Visa and UnionPay; and has been instrumental in building the infrastructure that supports Nigeria&rsquo;s modern payments ecosystem.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Bespoke Processing Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Objectives


	Technical implementation of new business solution projects to time, cost, scope and quality.
	Technical implementation and support for Payattitude.
	System integration requirements and solution analysis for new business initiatives.
	Analyze new user/solution requirements to develop solutions that align with requirements.


Duties &amp; Responsibilities


	Full documentation and standardization of all processes.
	Developing functional and technical requirements for projects.
	Technical implementation of new business solutions to meet go-to-market timelines.
	Transaction Testing with various banks.
	Testing and validating the functionalities of products and services.
	Implementation of key products that enhance and increase acceptability of Payattitude products.
	Development of user and operations documentation of new solution projects &amp; business analysis.


Key Performance Indicators


	Payattitude Implementation and Support - Prepaid, Debit and Payattitude Digital.
	Efficient and timely deployment of fixes / patches.
	External and internal Customer satisfaction (based on Customer ratings).
	Satisfactory Audit rating for new products and initiatives.
	Project Implementation within schedule, cost and scope.


Job Requirements


	Education: OND in Engineering, Information Technology or Applied Sciences.
	Experience: Understanding of the key technical concepts in I.T &amp; Electronic Payments.
	Candidate should possess ability to relate with clients to achieve business goals.


Key Competency Requirements:
Knowledge:


	Technical Knowledge in Information Technology.
	Strong analytical skills.
	Basic SQL.
	Strong Issue Resolution Acumen.


Skill / Competencies:


	Strong interpersonal skills.
	Deductive reasoning abilities and eye for details.
	Project implementation skills.
	Project Management.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@up-ng.com using &quot;Bespoke Processing Engineer&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Bespoke Processing Engineer Job at Unified Payment Services Limited




        
    

        
        Unified Payment Services Limited is a group of companies with services including Banking, Payment Scheme, Financial Technology, Digital Commerce, Value Added Service, Payment Solutions, Software Solutions, etc. Unified Payments is a principal member or licensed acquirer of American Express, Mastercard, Visa and UnionPay; and has been instrumental in building the infrastructure that supports Nigeria’s modern payments ecosystem.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Bespoke Processing Engineer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Objectives
     

            
    




	Technical implementation of new business solution projects to time, cost, scope and quality.
	Technical implementation and support for Payattitude.
	System integration requirements and solution analysis for new business initiatives.
	Analyze new user/solution requirements to develop solutions that align with requirements.


Duties & Responsibilities


	Full documentation and standardization of all processes.
	Developing functional and technical requirements for projects.
	Technical implementation of new business solutions to meet go-to-market timelines.
	Transaction Testing with various banks.
	Testing and validating the functionalities of products and services.
	Implementation of key products that enhance and increase acceptability of Payattitude products.
	Development of user and operations documentation of new solution projects & business analysis.


Key Performance Indicators


	Payattitude Implementation and Support - Prepaid, Debit and Payattitude Digital.
	Efficient and timely deployment of fixes / patches.
	External and internal Customer satisfaction (based on Customer ratings).
	Satisfactory Audit rating for new products and initiatives.
	Project Implementation within schedule, cost and scope.


Job Requirements


	Education: OND in Engineering, Information Technology or Applied Sciences.
	Experience: Understanding of the key technical concepts in I.T & Electronic Payments.
	Candidate should possess ability to relate with clients to achieve business goals.


Key Competency Requirements:
Knowledge:


	Technical Knowledge in Information Technology.
	Strong analytical skills.
	Basic SQL.
	Strong Issue Resolution Acumen.


Skill / Competencies:


	Strong interpersonal skills.
	Deductive reasoning abilities and eye for details.
	Project implementation skills.
	Project Management.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Bespoke Processing Engineer" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

title: Job Openings at HR Aid Consults
content:
At HR Aid, we provide consulting services in the area of Human Resource Management. Our focus is in helping our clients hire, engage and retain the best talent. We offer professional services in Talent Recruitment and Selection, HR Policy Development, Compensation & Benefits Structure Development, Performance Management and HR Advisory.

We are recruiting to fill the following positions below:

1.) Portfolio Analyst

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

            
    




	A key aspect of the role is identifying underperforming investments and developing turnaround strategies to drive operational improvements and recommend restructuring or exit strategies where required.
	This is not a reporting role. You will build the analytical engine that drives investment decisions, board accountability, and operational turnaround across a multi-sector portfolio, with direct exposure to a Group Executive and operating company boards from day one.


Responsibilities


	Portfolio Financial Analysis: Build and maintain financial models across portfolio companies. Produce EBITDA bridges, variance analyses, and management account reviews. Own the monthly performance pack from data to board-ready output.
	Board & Governance Reporting: Synthesize portfolio results into crisp, decision-grade board materials for principal-level decision-makers. Turn management accounts into a narrative with flags and recommendations.
	Valuation & Investment Support: Support deal analysis, hold-versus-exit assessments, and capital allocation decisions. Build DCF, LBO, and comparable models. Conduct sector benchmarking.
	Operational Performance Work: Support turnaround and performance-improvement programs. Analyze unit economics, cost structures, and working capital. Translate operational data into financial impact.
	AI-Augmented Modelling: Use AI tools like Claude, Copilot, and similar to accelerate financial analysis, automate reporting, and build dynamic dashboards. AI-assisted work is a core expectation.


Qualifications


	3–4 years in investment banking, consulting (deals or performance improvement), or wealth/asset management
	Financial modelling and valuation: DCF, LBO, comparables, scenario analysis
	Comfort preparing and interpreting financial statements (P&L, balance sheet, cash flow)
	Experience producing board-level materials for senior decision-makers
	Exposure to multi-entity, portfolio, or transformation environments
	Strong Excel; AI-assisted working practice a distinct advantage


Other Requirements:


	Relentless numeracy: Genuine curiosity about what the numbers mean, not just what they say.
	Discretion: You will handle sensitive portfolio information Confidentiality is non-negotiable.
	Bias for synthesis over data-dumping. Boards need one answer, not twelve slides
	Intellectual honesty: Able to flag a bad number even when it is inconvenient
	Self-direction. The Group Exec moves fast; keep pace without handholding
	Commercial instinct that goes beyond finance technique.


Salary
N800,000 - N1,000,000 per month.

Application Closing Date: 3rd July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

 

2.) Procurement Officer

Job Location: Ago Palace Way Okota - Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a competent and experienced Procurement Officer to manage our client’s purchasing activities, ensure timely procurement of goods and services, maintain supplier relationships, and achieve cost-effective purchasing while maintaining quality standards.


Key Responsibilities


	Source, evaluate, and engage suppliers and vendors.
	Obtain and analyze quotations to ensure competitive pricing.
	Prepare and process purchase orders and procurement documentation.
	Negotiate prices, delivery schedules, and contract terms with suppliers.
	Monitor and track orders to ensure timely delivery.
	Maintain accurate procurement records and supplier databases.
	Liaise with internal departments to determine procurement requirements.
	Conduct market research to identify reliable suppliers and cost-saving opportunities.
	Ensure compliance with company procurement policies and procedures.
	Resolve procurement-related issues and supplier performance concerns.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Business Administration, Purchasing & Supply, Supply Chain Management, or a related field.
	Minimum of 2 years of proven experience in procurement, purchasing, or supply chain management.
	Strong negotiation and vendor management skills.
	Good knowledge of procurement processes and inventory management.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, particularly Excel.
	Proficiency in at least one procurement or ERP software, such as Zoho Inventory, Zoho Books, SAP, Oracle, Odoo, Microsoft Dynamics, Sage, or similar procurement management systems.
	Ability to use procurement software for vendor management, purchase order processing, inventory tracking, and procurement reporting.
	Excellent communication, analytical, and organizational skills.
	Ability to work independently and manage multiple tasks effectively.


Key Competencies


	Attention to detail.
	Integrity and professionalism.
	Strong problem-solving skills.
	Time management and organizational ability.
	Cost-conscious and results-oriented mindset.


Salary
N150,000 monthly.

Application Closing Date: 10th July, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.


3.) Property Manager (Legal)

Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking a competent and proactive Property Manager to oversee the management of the Company's property portfolio and maintain effective relationships between landlords, property owners, and tenants.
	The ideal candidate must be a qualified Lawyer with strong property management experience and the ability to manage tenancy matters, property-related legal issues, and stakeholder relationships.


Key Responsibilities


	Manage relationships with landlords, property owners, and tenants, acting on behalf of property owners in the administration of assigned properties.
	Attract and onboard suitable tenants through property marketing, referrals, and other approved channels.
	Conduct tenant screening, guarantor verification, and referral profiling.
	Prepare, review, and manage tenancy agreements, lease documents, and other property-related legal documentation.
	Examine legal issues relating to properties and projects and provide guidance to mitigate legal risks.
	Ensure compliance with applicable property laws, regulations, and company policies.
	Liaise with facility managers and service providers to ensure proper maintenance of managed properties.
	Investigate and resolve tenant complaints and disputes promptly and professionally.
	Conduct routine inspections of occupied and vacant properties.
	Develop and enforce occupancy policies and procedures.
	Prepare periodic reports on property performance, tenancy status, occupancy levels, and departmental activities.
	Provide Management with regular updates on all properties under the Company's management.
	Collaborate with other departments to ensure efficient service delivery and achievement of organizational goals.


Requirements


	LL.B Degree and qualification as a Barrister and Solicitor of the Supreme Court of Nigeria (BL).
	3–5 years of relevant experience in Property Management, Real Estate, or Property Law.
	Sound knowledge of tenancy laws, lease administration, and property documentation.
	Strong negotiation, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
	Excellent report-writing and analytical abilities.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications.
	Ability to manage multiple assignments and work with minimal supervision


Salary
N300,000 - N350,000 / Month

Application Closing Date: 29th June, 2026.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send the CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Field Sales Agent",
  "description": "Abelinis is a third-party resource management company that provides and manages workforce solutions for clients such as Lafarge, Guinness, Friesland, and others. We are responsible for end-to-end resource management, including recruitment, payroll administration, and workforce/community engagement on behalf of these partner organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Sales Agent

Job Location: Anambra
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are a seeking high performing and disciplined Sales Representatives to drive retail sales execution and expand market coverage within assigned territories.
	This role is critical to delivering strong in market performance by ensuring product availability, converting competitive outlets, and maintaining excellent retail relationships. Successful candidates will serve as brand ambassadors, executing sales strategies that strengthen Lafarge&rsquo;s presence across key markets.


Key Responsibilities
Sales &amp; Market Expansion:


	Drive retail sales by generating and fulfilling orders across assigned territories.
	Identify, recruit, and onboard new retail outlets to expand Lafarge&rsquo;s market footprint.
	Convert retailers from competing brands to increase market share.


Territory Coverage &amp; Execution:


	Ensure 100% coverage of all assigned retail outlets through consistent and structured route planning.
	Follow up and close leads from field teams (TAEs), prioritizing proximity and conversion efficiency.


Market Execution Excellence:


	Ensure continuous availability of Lafarge products across all retail outlets.
	Execute best-in-class merchandising standards, ensuring optimal product visibility, display, and positioning.


Operational Effectiveness;


	Support field operations and deliver on assigned tasks in line with business objectives and performance standards.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Sales Target Achievement
	Retail Coverage (100% outlet visitation)
	New Outlet Acquisition &amp; Competitive Conversions
	Product Availability &amp; Visibility Compliance
	Lead Conversion Efficiency


Requirements


	OND / HND / BSc in any discipline (FMCG or building materials experience is an advantage).
	1&ndash;3 years of experience in sales, retail execution, or field operations.
	Strong understanding of local market terrain within assigned locations.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work in a target-driven, fast-paced environment.
	High level of discipline, accountability, and professionalism.


Salary


	N250,000 - N300,000 per month.


Why Join Us?


	You will be part of a globally recognized brand committed to innovation, sustainability, and excellence in building solutions.
	This role offers hands-on market experience, structured career growth, and the opportunity to contribute to impactful infrastructure development across Nigeria.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@abelinisng.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Field Sales Agent Job at Abelinis




        
    

        
        Abelinis is a third-party resource management company that provides and manages workforce solutions for clients such as Lafarge, Guinness, Friesland, and others. We are responsible for end-to-end resource management, including recruitment, payroll administration, and workforce/community engagement on behalf of these partner organizations.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Field Sales Agent

Job Location: Anambra
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are a seeking high performing and disciplined Sales Representatives to drive retail sales execution and expand market coverage within assigned territories.
	This role is critical to delivering strong in market performance by ensuring product availability, converting competitive outlets, and maintaining excellent retail relationships. Successful candidates will serve as brand ambassadors, executing sales strategies that strengthen Lafarge’s presence across key markets.


Key Responsibilities
Sales & Market Expansion:


	Drive retail sales by generating and fulfilling orders across assigned territories.
	Identify, recruit, and onboard new retail outlets to expand Lafarge’s market footprint.
	Convert retailers from competing brands to increase market share.


Territory Coverage & Execution:


	Ensure 100% coverage of all assigned retail outlets through consistent and structured route planning.
	Follow up and close leads from field teams (TAEs), prioritizing proximity and conversion efficiency.


Market Execution Excellence:


	Ensure continuous availability of Lafarge products across all retail outlets.
	Execute best-in-class merchandising standards, ensuring optimal product visibility, display, and positioning.


Operational Effectiveness;


	Support field operations and deliver on assigned tasks in line with business objectives and performance standards.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Sales Target Achievement
	Retail Coverage (100% outlet visitation)
	New Outlet Acquisition & Competitive Conversions
	Product Availability & Visibility Compliance
	Lead Conversion Efficiency


Requirements


	OND / HND / BSc in any discipline (FMCG or building materials experience is an advantage).
	1–3 years of experience in sales, retail execution, or field operations.
	Strong understanding of local market terrain within assigned locations.
	Excellent communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills.
	Ability to work in a target-driven, fast-paced environment.
	High level of discipline, accountability, and professionalism.


Salary


	N250,000 - N300,000 per month.


Why Join Us?


	You will be part of a globally recognized brand committed to innovation, sustainability, and excellence in building solutions.
	This role offers hands-on market experience, structured career growth, and the opportunity to contribute to impactful infrastructure development across Nigeria.


Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Business Development Manager Job at Hommaston




        
    

        
        Hommaston operates two core divisions. Red Division (Hommaston Engineering) focal delivery of choice skillsets for design engineering, facility maintenance and operations supports competency and performance. Blue division (Hommaston Digital) handles human capital development, drone tech, cloud computing, corporate soft skills and all other non-engineering, certification preparatory courses. At Our Training Facilities, we prioritize creating a conducive learning environment that promotes comfort and enhances the learning experience. Our courses are carefully crafted to ensure that our learners acquire, retain, and apply knowledge effectively.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Business Development Manager
     

            
    



Job Location: Nigeria
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirement


	Interested candidates should possess relevant qualifications


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
